title: Cloud Architect/Cloud Engineer/Cloud Infrastructure/AWS
description:
Responsibilities

  • Design and own AWS-based cloud architectures, including compute, storage, networking, security, and middleware.

  • Translate business requirements into scalable, secure, and high-availability solutions using microservices, serverless, and container technologies.

  • Lead cloud migration and modernization initiatives, including legacy system refactoring and on-prem/cloud-to-AWS migrations.

  • Define and standardize cloud platform capabilities, including multi-account landing zones, IAM, logging/monitoring, and IaC practices.

  • Ensure architectures meet security, compliance, reliability, and cost optimization standards (DR, encryption, autoscaling, cost control).

  • Act as a technical leader, mentoring teams and driving architectural best practices across projects.

Requirements

  • 5+ years of experience in cloud architecture, system design, or infrastructure engineering.

  • Strong hands-on expertise with AWS, including EC2, ECS/EKS, Lambda, S3, VPC, RDS/Aurora, DynamoDB, IAM, CloudWatch.

  • Proven experience designing large-scale distributed systems and cloud-native platforms.

  • Solid knowledge of microservices, DevOps, CI/CD, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform / CloudFormation).

  • Strong understanding of high availability, security, networking, and cost optimization.

  • Experience leading technical decisions or mentoring engineers is a plus.


About Us

Dada Consultants was established in 2017, with the commitment of providing the best recruitment services in Singapore. We are comprised of a dynamic head-hunting team dedicated to sourcing for highly competent professionals in IT industry. We provide enterprises with customized talent solutions, and bring talents to career advancement.

www.dadaconsultants.com

EA Registration Number: R25128548

postedCompany.description:
Do you still think the boutique agency cannot advanced your own tech recruitment career?

Are you considering to change your career path from big agency to enjoy the best commission structure and working with best in class tech clients in Singapore?

Join US!

We are the Singapore and China based technology recruitment agency and specialised in providing talent solution for internet and technology industry. Our client portfolio are including the global internet technology giants, technology MNC and Tech startup. Whatever technology clients you are think of? Yes we do have!

Due to confidence and client demand in Singapore, we're looking for an experienced tech recruitment Consultant to join our team to service our clients across Asia Pacific.

In this role you'll help our clients identify & hire talent people not only with the right skills and experience, but also the right motivational and cultural fit - people who'll stay and perform.
